title: Dysphania rhadinostachya
taxonomy: Dysphania rhadinostachya is classified within the family Amaranthaceae and belongs to the order Caryophyllales. It is a species of the genus Dysphania, which is a group of flowering plants native to Australia. The classification of Dysphania rhadinostachya is also aligned with the APG III system, which groups it under the family Amaranthaceae. In addition, this species is further classified as a dicotyledonous plant, characterized by having two cotyledons in its seedling stage. Its classification under the family Amaranthaceae is consistent with other species in the same genus.
